title: Sony confirms the end of physical media on PlayStation, triggering a wave of criticism
summary: Sony's decision to eliminate discs in its future consoles sparks a fierce debate about digital ownership and draws reactions from the industry, players, and preservation activists.

title: Capcom brings forward the release date of Onimusha: Way of the Sword
summary: Onimusha: Way of the Sword launches 21 days earlier than scheduled, shifting its release to avoid the crowded September launch window.

title: Xbox plans to follow Sony's lead and eliminate physical media in its next console, Project Helix
summary: New rumors indicate that Xbox will abandon discs, while internal changes, possible studio closures, and denials about Obsidian's future are reported.

title: Frictional Games delays its highly anticipated horror game Ontos until 2027
summary: The studio behind Amnesia and Soma postpones Ontos to achieve its ambitious vision, amidst pressure to match the success of its earlier works.

title: Steam Machines return to mixed reviews, including from former PlayStation president
summary: Shuhei Yoshida and other veterans test the new Steam Machines and come away unimpressed, while Valve is already working on a second generation.

title: Diablo 4 Season 14 sparks mixed reactions among players
summary: While some praise the return of difficulty, others criticize the new season for ignoring the improvements introduced by the Lord of Hatred expansion.

title: Rockstar faces criticism over pay disparity and crunch as GTA 6 nears
summary: Unions and employees denounce poor labor practices at Rockstar Games, while the price of GTA 6 and its absence on PC create controversy among players.

title: Final Fantasy VII Revelation could have multiple DLC and a story expansion, according to leaks
summary: The Final Fantasy VII Revelation store page reveals planned downloadable content, and new leaks suggest the game won't end with its initial launch.

title: Company of Heroes returns with a new wave-based defense game announced as Final Stand
summary: Company of Heroes 3: Final Stand leans into the roguelite wave defense genre, and will arrive soon on PC, according to the reveal trailer.

title: The high cost of PC components results in games requiring 900 euros in RAM
summary: AMD's price hikes on GPUs and VRAM clash with titles like Cinder City, which had to lower its 64 GB RAM requirement following widespread criticism.

title: Suicide Squad developers discuss the game's failure and its impact on the industry
summary: The leaders of the Suicide Squad: Kill the Justice League team confess that the project made them feel like they had stopped making video games and were just following a spreadsheet.

title: Valheim will increase its price by 50% when it reaches version 1.0 and will not revamp its oceans
summary: Iron Gate confirms that Valheim will see a significant price increase at its official launch and rules out updating the game's ocean biome for now.

title: Hideo Kojima's Xbox game, OD, survives Microsoft's cutbacks
summary: According to multiple reports, the experimental horror game OD from Kojima Productions is safe from the wave of cancellations and strategic shifts within Xbox.

title: Dune: Awakening announces a physical edition for consoles and reveals new details
summary: The survival MMO Dune: Awakening will launch a physical disc edition for PS5 and shows a new cinematic trailer ahead of September 2026.

title: Amazon Prime gives away a dozen games to its subscribers in July
summary: Amazon Prime members can claim several free games during July, as part of the platform's monthly benefits program.

title: Possible Metroid Ravenous leak generates expectations about the future of the franchise
summary: A new store listing and rumors suggest that Nintendo may have several Metroid projects in development, including the mysterious title Ravenous.

title: The controversial summer skin for Captain America in Marvel Rivals causes a stir
summary: Captain America's summer costume in Marvel Rivals has garnered significant attention online for its physical detail, quickly becoming a viral topic of discussion.

title: Forza Horizon 6 continues to expand its map with new areas and events
summary: Forza Horizon 6 players can explore new speed zones and treasure hunts in the Sotoyama region and Festival Loop.

title: Autobattlers and dark alchemy come together in the new game Flask
summary: The Flask demo on Steam allows players to dive into an innovative hand-drawn autobattler to create squads of grotesque alchemical creatures.

title: The streaming success of Obsession and the release of the year's biggest sci-fi on Prime Video
summary: The film Obsession dominates VOD after just three days, while Prime Video releases one of the most anticipated sci-fi works of the year.
